items.title: Sources: Tchouaméni agrees new Real Madrid deal
items.summary: Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni has agreed a new contract to tie him to the Spanish giants until 2031, sources confirmed to ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Linda Noskova vs. Marta Kostyuk odds, prediction: 2026 Wimbledon ladies' semifinal picks by proven expert
items.summary: SportsLine's Jose Onorato reveals his picks for the 2026 Wimbledon ladies' semifinal featuring Marta Kostyuk vs. Linda Noskova on Thursday

items.title: Can Djokovic pull off an epic upset over Sinner?
items.summary: Jannik Sinner is the defending Wimbledon champ and No. 1 seed. But Novak Djokovic already has seven titles -- and just had a monumental win.
